summary: Iteration 84 - Unified Photo Hub UI/UX Standardization Testing Complete. All backend APIs working correctly (7/7 tests passed). Frontend features verified: On-Demand Settings Full Gallery toggle, 100 photo slider limit, Bookings Manager resolution-tiered pricing, Photo Tools drawer labels.

minor.issue: Returns 403 for kelly@surf.com user (Pro role) - user may not be recognized as photographer role
minor.status: NOTED - API works with test_ondemand_pro user

on_demand_full_gallery_toggle.details: Full Gallery Access toggle present in On-Demand Settings page. When enabled: shows 'FULL GALLERY' badge, displays infinity (∞) symbol, hides slider, shows 'Surfers get unlimited photo downloads' message

on_demand_slider_100_limit.details: Slider shows range from '0 (none)' to '100+' - confirming 20 photo limit has been removed

on_demand_settings_api_full_gallery.details: GET /api/photographer/{id}/on-demand-settings returns on_demand_full_gallery field. POST accepts and saves on_demand_full_gallery

bookings_manager_resolution_pricing.details: Booking Rates card shows Photo Resolution Pricing section with Web ($3), Standard ($5), High-Res ($10) tiers

bookings_manager_pricing_modal.details: Edit Rates modal includes: Session Pricing (Hourly Rate, Min Hours), Photo Resolution Pricing (Web-Res, Standard, High-Res inputs), Photos Included in Buy-In with Full Gallery Access toggle

pricing_api_booking_tiers.details: GET /api/photographer/{id}/pricing returns booking_price_web, booking_price_standard, booking_price_high, booking_photos_included, booking_full_gallery. PUT accepts and persists all fields

photo_tools_drawer_labels.details: PhotoToolsDrawer.js confirms: 'Bookings Manager' label with 'Tiered pricing • Sessions & requests' description and NEW badge, 'Earnings Dashboard' label (not just 'Earnings')

pricing_parity.details: Both General Bookings (/pricing) and On-Demand/Live (/gallery-pricing) have Web/Standard/High resolution tiers

critical_code_review_comments: On-Demand Settings page correctly implements Full Gallery toggle above Photos Included slider
Slider max changed from 20 to 100 as per requirement
When Full Gallery enabled: slider hidden, infinity symbol shown, descriptive text updated
Bookings Manager has full parity with On-Demand/Live for resolution-tiered pricing
Photo Tools drawer has correct labels: 'Bookings Manager' (with NEW badge and 'Tiered pricing' description), 'Earnings Dashboard'
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test_ondemand_pro user from iteration 83
context_for_next_testing_agent: Unified Photo Hub features fully implemented. On-Demand Settings has Full Gallery toggle that hides slider and shows infinity symbol. Bookings Manager has resolution-tiered pricing (Web/Standard/High) matching On-Demand/Live. Photo Tools drawer labels updated to 'Bookings Manager' with NEW badge and 'Earnings Dashboard'. Test user test_ondemand_pro@test.com (Approved Pro) works for all photographer API endpoints.
